title: On the Challenges Facing Combinatorial <mark>Electrochemical Impedance</mark> Spectroscopy for Li-Ion Batteries
authors: Janine Richter, Alexander Pompian, Robert Black, Sarish Rehman, Zoya Sadighi and Eric McCalla
abstract: High-throughput <mark>electrochemical impedance</mark> spectroscopy (EIS) offers significant potential for the rapid characterization of battery electrode materials and the extraction of descriptors for data-driven materials discovery. In this work, we present over 700 EIS spectra measured in a semi-automated workflow of up to 64 electrode samples in a combinatorial electrochemical cell with liquid electrolyte in half-cells, symmetric cells and anodeless cells. While the approach enables efficient acquisition of large EIS datasets, we identify key limitations that currently impede the reliable extraction o…
